name: Tunda
description: Cascaded buffer utility that can act as a 4:1 mixer, 1:4 mult, 2:2 split, precision amplifier or attenuator while keeping audio and CV steady.

inputs.name: In 1
inputs.description: First cascaded buffer input. Use it as the head of a mix, mult or scaling chain.

outputs.name: Average Out
outputs.description: Average output for controlled summing without level runaway.

behaviors.name: 4:1 mix
behaviors.trigger: four sources patched into the chain
behaviors.description: Tunda can behave like a compact averaging mixer when you feed it multiple signals and take the average output.

behaviors.name: 1:4 mult
behaviors.trigger: one source into the first stage
behaviors.description: A single source can be distributed through the cascade as a buffered mult without the sag of passive splitting.

behaviors.name: 2:2 split
behaviors.description: The cascade can be used as two buffered branches, making it easy to keep a pitch or modulation path clean and stable.

behaviors.name: Precision scaling
behaviors.trigger: use the buffer chain for gain staging
behaviors.description: The module is intended for exact ratios such as x2, x3, x4 or 0.75, 0.5 and 0.25, which makes it useful for CV and audio alike.

behaviors.name: Chainable routing
behaviors.description: The cascade can be extended by linking several units, so the utility scales with the size of the patch instead of capping it.

patchIdeas.name: Buffered pitch fan-out
patchIdeas.patch: Feed one sequencer CV into the first stage and use the cascade to drive several oscillators without losing tuning stability.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tunda:
Sequencer:
VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Tunda (In 1)
- Tunda (Out 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Tunda (Out 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Tunda (Out 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Tunda (Out 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Averaged voice mix
patchIdeas.patch: Send four voices into the four stages and take the average output to keep the sum controlled before the final mixer.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tunda:
Voice 1:
Voice 2:
Voice 3:
Voice 4:
Output:

- Voice 1 (Out) -> Tunda (In 1)
- Voice 2 (Out) -> Tunda (In 2)
- Voice 3 (Out) -> Tunda (In 3)
- Voice 4 (Out) -> Tunda (In 4)
- Tunda (Average Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Modulation scaler
patchIdeas.patch: Use Tunda to scale a slow LFO upward into audio-range motion or pull it down into a gentle attenuated sweep.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Tunda:
LFO:
Filter:
Output:

- LFO (Out) -> Tunda (In 1)
- Tunda (Out 1) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Tunda (Average Out) -> Output (In)
